battlePieceCodes.title: Battle Piece Codes
battlePieceCodes.intro: Battle Piece is an anime action Roblox experience by Studio Multiverse. Codes are released through the official Roblox page and the Studio Multiverse community. Use this section to track active codes, expired codes, official sources, and the redeem-check workflow.
battlePieceCodes.activeEmpty: No active Battle Piece code is currently listed on the official Roblox page. New codes arrive with major updates and community announcements.
battlePieceCodes.expiredEmpty: No expired Battle Piece code is currently listed on the official Roblox page.

sources.label: Official Roblox Experience
sources.detail: The main Battle Piece play page by Studio Multiverse.

sources.label: Developer Community
sources.detail: The developer community for Battle Piece updates, codes, and announcements.

workflow: Open Battle Piece from the official Roblox experience page.
Check the Studio Multiverse community before redeeming a new code.
Copy the code exactly as posted, including capital letters and symbols.
Redeem it through the in-game code entry when a code is available.
Rejoin a fresh server after major updates if a code does not apply.

battlePieceOfficialLinks.title: Battle Piece Official Roblox Link
battlePieceOfficialLinks.intro: Battle Piece is an anime action adventure on Roblox by Studio Multiverse. Players defeat bandits, fight in PvP, clear raids, and work toward becoming the strongest fighter. The official Roblox page lists an Alpha build, a Level Cap of 600, and PC, mobile, and console support.

battlePieceBeginnerGuide.title: Battle Piece Beginner Guide
battlePieceBeginnerGuide.intro: Start from the official Roblox experience, learn bandit combat first, then move into PvP and raids. The current progression target is Level 600.

steps.heading: Launch the Official Roblox Experience
steps.body: Start from the official Battle Piece page by Studio Multiverse to enter the correct server.
steps.goal: Enter the correct Battle Piece server.

steps.heading: Learn Combat Through Bandits
steps.body: The official game description highlights defeating powerful bandits as a core activity. Use bandit fights to learn hit range, movement, and cooldown rhythm.

steps.heading: Level Before Serious PvP
steps.body: Use early PvE fights to understand your weapon or power before entering intense PvP battles.
steps.goal: Stabilize your controls before player fights.

steps.heading: Build Toward Level 600
steps.body: The current Battle Piece level cap is 600. Treat Level 600 as the main long-term progression target.
steps.goal: Track leveling progress against the current cap.

steps.heading: Enter PvP After the Basics
steps.body: PvP battles are a central part of Battle Piece. Practice spacing, chase tools, and escape timing before treating PvP as your main grind.
steps.goal: Move from PvE practice into player fights.

steps.heading: Try Raids With a Stable Build
steps.body: The Roblox description highlights challenging raids. Bring a loadout that can clear enemies consistently before focusing on raid speed.
steps.goal: Prepare for group or high-pressure PvE content.

steps.heading: Use a Private Server for High Ping
steps.body: The official description recommends joining a private server when ping is high.
steps.goal: Reduce lag while leveling or testing combat.

battlePieceTierList.title: Battle Piece Weapons and Powers Tier List
battlePieceTierList.intro: Rank Battle Piece loadout traits around the game modes shown on the Roblox page: bandit fighting, PvP battles, and raids. The grid favors practical value across early game, PvP, raid, mobility, and ease of use.

tiers.name: Mobility + Burst Loadouts
tiers.why: Top-priority traits for Battle Piece because PvP and raids reward fast engagement, quick escapes, and clean burst windows.

tiers.name: Wide-Area PvE Loadouts
tiers.why: Strong for the official PvE loop because Battle Piece centers on defeating bandits and clearing challenging raids.

tiers.name: Simple Melee Weapons
tiers.why: Reliable for new players who need consistent hit timing before moving into PvP battles or raid pressure.

tiers.name: Single-Target Duel Loadouts
tiers.why: Useful when you control spacing, but less flexible than mobility or wide-area options during early leveling and raid waves.

tiers.name: Defensive Spacing Loadouts
tiers.why: Good for staying alive in PvP and raids, but slower for bandit farming and level pushing.

tiers.name: Slow Low-Mobility Builds
tiers.why: A weak fit for Battle Piece modes because PvP, raids, and bandit clearing all reward speed, reach, or area control.

battlePiecePvpCombat.title: Battle Piece PvP Combat Guide
battlePiecePvpCombat.intro: Battle Piece includes PvP battles as one of its core activities, alongside bandit fights and raids. Build basic combat control first, reduce ping with private servers when needed, and use early farming to move toward the Level Cap of 600.

cards.title: PvP Is a Core Mode
cards.description: Battle Piece officially highlights intense PvP battles as a main activity. Treat PvP as a progression test where combat strength, movement, and reaction speed all matter.

cards.title: Prepare Before Fighting Players
cards.description: Start by defeating bandits and learning your combat rhythm before jumping into PvP. Bandit farming gives safer practice for attack timing, spacing, and recovery.

cards.title: Use the Right Platform Setup
cards.description: Battle Piece supports PC, mobile, and console. PC players get cleaner keyboard control, mobile players should keep the screen clear for movement and attacks, and console players should check input comfort before serious fights.

cards.title: Reduce Ping Problems
cards.description: The official game page recommends private servers for high ping. A smoother connection helps you land dodges and combos instead of fighting lag.

cards.title: Train Around the Level Cap
cards.description: The current Level Cap is 600. PvP preparation should focus on steady leveling, repeatable combat practice, and proven build fundamentals.

battlePieceRaidsGuide.title: Battle Piece Raids and Boss Progression Guide
battlePieceRaidsGuide.intro: Battle Piece officially lists challenging raids as a major activity, with bandits and PvP battles forming the combat foundation around them. The current Alpha build has a Level Cap of 600, so raid preparation focuses on leveling, stable controls, and repeatable team readiness.

items.question: When should players start thinking about raids in Battle Piece?
items.answer: Players should start with bandit fights first, then move into harder combat once their movement, attack timing, and survival habits feel stable. Raids are positioned as a higher-pressure activity, so entering after basic farming practice makes progression smoother.

items.question: What should Battle Piece raid preparation focus on?
items.answer: Raid preparation should focus on combat consistency, leveling progress, platform comfort, and connection stability. Players benefit from reliable fundamentals that hold up under raid pressure.

items.question: How do PvP and raids connect in Battle Piece?
items.answer: PvP battles and raids both test combat control under pressure. Bandits teach the basics, PvP sharpens reaction and spacing, and raids give players a structured challenge to conquer.

items.question: What is the current Battle Piece progression ceiling?
items.answer: The current Level Cap is 600. Players use that cap as the main long-term progression target while moving through bandit farming, PvP practice, and raid attempts.

items.question: How should players handle lag before Battle Piece raids?
items.answer: The official game page recommends joining a private server when ping is high. A stable server helps players practice raid movement and combat timing without losing fights to lag.

battlePieceBanditsFarming.title: Battle Piece Bandits and Farming Guide
battlePieceBanditsFarming.intro: Battle Piece officially tells players to defeat powerful bandits, master PvP battles, and conquer raids. Bandit farming is the cleanest early practice loop because it lets players learn combat before higher-pressure PvP and raid content.

rows.purpose: Early combat practice and steady progression
rows.action: Fight bandits repeatedly to learn attack timing, movement, and basic survival before moving into harder content.
rows.bestFor: New players learning the core combat loop

rows.action: Use a private server when ping is high so farming and combat inputs feel more stable.
rows.bestFor: Players dealing with lag or unstable public servers

rows.action: Use bandit fights to practice spacing, recovery, and control before challenging real players.
rows.bestFor: Players moving from farming into PvP

rows.action: Farm and practice until combat feels controlled, then use that progress to attempt raids more confidently.
Work toward the current Level Cap of 600 through repeatable combat and steady farming habits.

battlePieceUpdatesTracker.title: Battle Piece Updates, Community, and Patch Tracker
battlePieceUpdatesTracker.intro: Battle Piece is currently in Alpha, and the official game page directs players to the community for updates, codes, and more. This tracker keeps the update flow centered on Roblox, Studio Multiverse, and official video evidence.

entries.label: Alpha Release Status
entries.title: Battle Piece is live in Alpha
entries.description: The current Roblox page labels Battle Piece as released and states the game is in Alpha. Players may experience lag or bugs while fixes and updates continue.

entries.label: Core Gameplay Pillars
entries.title: Bandits, PvP battles, and raids define the current loop
entries.description: The official game description highlights defeating powerful bandits, mastering PvP battles, and conquering challenging raids as the main activities.

entries.label: Level Cap Notice
entries.title: Current Level Cap is 600
entries.description: The Roblox page lists the current Level Cap as 600, making it the main visible progression ceiling for Battle Piece players.

entries.label: Platform Support
entries.title: PC, mobile, and console are supported
entries.description: Battle Piece currently lists support for PC, mobile, and console, so update notes track platform-related fixes and control changes.

entries.label: Community and Codes
entries.title: Studio Multiverse community is the update hub
entries.description: The official Roblox page tells players to join the community for updates, codes, and more. Code notices are checked against the Roblox page and Studio Multiverse sources first.

entries.label: Gameplay Video Tracking
entries.title: Video updates show visible gameplay changes
entries.description: Official or clearly relevant gameplay videos help players understand changes to combat, raids, farming, or progression when the footage shows the current game state.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Battle Piece

questions.question: What is Battle Piece?
questions.answer: Battle Piece is an anime action Roblox adventure by Studio Multiverse. Players defeat powerful bandits, fight in PvP battles, clear challenging raids, and build toward becoming the strongest fighter.

questions.question: Where can I play Battle Piece?
questions.answer: You can play Battle Piece on the official Roblox experience page by Studio Multiverse. The game supports PC, mobile, and console.

questions.question: What is the current Battle Piece level cap?
questions.answer: The current Battle Piece level cap is 600, listed on the official Roblox page as the main progression target.

questions.question: Does Battle Piece have codes?
questions.answer: Yes. Battle Piece codes are released through the official Roblox page and the Studio Multiverse community. Check the Battle Piece Codes section for active codes and the redeem workflow.

questions.question: What are the core Battle Piece game modes?
questions.answer: The core Battle Piece modes are defeating bandits, PvP battles, and raids. The official Roblox description highlights all three as main activities.

questions.question: Is Battle Piece in Alpha?
questions.answer: Yes. Battle Piece is marked as an Alpha build on the official Roblox page, with active development, fixes, and content updates ongoing.

cta.title: Ready to Play Battle Piece?
cta.description: Jump into Battle Piece on Roblox, join the Studio Multiverse community, and stay updated with the latest codes, powers, and raid guides!

whySteps.step3Description: Grab code rewards whenever new powers, weapons, or raid content drops
